description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Feelpp PKG Apptainer that dispatches a workflow with customizable inputs for building and pushing Apptainer images. The workflow can be triggered manually with inputs for flavor, distribution, Apptainer image build, Docker images, parallel jobs, and skip build. It uses a self-apptainer job that logs in to the GitHub Container Registry, pulls a Docker image, inspects it, and pushes the resulting Apptainer image to ghcr.io.
